title: sclarea × sylvestris
intro: Sclarea × sylvestris, also known as clary sage, is a plant species belonging to the mint family and is a hybrid of Salvia sclarea and Salvia sylvestris. Clary sage has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of clary sage include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and easing menstrual cramps and insomnia, as well as providing anti-aging properties. Clary sage can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
